title: Neon Protocol: Nightdome
description:
Neon Protocol: Nightdome is a cyberpunk text-based turn-based idle RPG. Create your character, choose a class path, build skill loadouts, collect equipment, and push through districts, bosses, dungeons, and long-term challenges in a city ruled by neon, implants, and hidden agendas.

The game focuses on low-friction play, long-term progression, and build crafting. Battles run automatically, but your class choices, skill setup, equipment affixes, set bonuses, enhancement, crafting, and resource decisions all shape how your character grows and performs. The desktop version also supports a boss key and window opacity settings for more flexible idle play.

Key Features:

- Desktop version supports a boss key and window opacity settings for more flexible idle play

- Single-player text-based turn-based idle RPG

- Multiple class paths and skill build options

- Auto battles, area progression, main bosses, and dungeon challenges

- Equipment drops, salvage, enhancement, crafting, sets, and affix builds

- Daily dungeons, Sky Tower, growth activities, and level rewards

- Story text and background fiction revealing the secrets of Nightdome

- Supports Simplified Chinese, English, Japanese, and Traditional Chinese

In Nightdome, raw power is not the only answer. Every build choice changes how the city answers back.
description_short: Create your character in the cyberpunk city of Nightdome, shape class skills, equipment affixes, and set builds, then push through areas, bosses, dungeons, and Sky Tower with auto battles. The desktop version supports a boss key and window opacity settings for flexible idle play.
